title: Recover vehicle refrigerants
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recover vehicle refrigerants demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to recover refrigerant

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret refrigerant recovery information, including Australian automotive code of practice1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify vehicle air conditioning system, components and refrigerant service ports for refrigerant recovery1.5 Identify equipment, personal protective equipment (PPE) and firefighting equipment for refrigerant recovery and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret refrigerant recovery information, including Australian automotive code of practice1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify vehicle air conditioning system, components and refrigerant service ports for refrigerant recovery1.5 Identify equipment, personal protective equipment (PPE) and firefighting equipment for refrigerant recovery and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret refrigerant recovery information, including Australian automotive code of practice1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify vehicle air conditioning system, components and refrigerant service ports for refrigerant recovery1.5 Identify equipment, personal protective equipment (PPE) and firefighting equipment for refrigerant recovery and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to recover refrigerant

elements.title: Operate recovery equipment

pcs.text: Identify vehicle refrigerant with a refrigerant identifier or analyser2.2 Weigh recovery cylinder and record available capacity and tare weight of cylinder2.3 Connect recovery equipment to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Recover refrigerant and transfer into designated recovery cylinder using recovery equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify vehicle refrigerant with a refrigerant identifier or analyser2.2 Weigh recovery cylinder and record available capacity and tare weight of cylinder2.3 Connect recovery equipment to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Recover refrigerant and transfer into designated recovery cylinder using recovery equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify vehicle refrigerant with a refrigerant identifier or analyser2.2 Weigh recovery cylinder and record available capacity and tare weight of cylinder2.3 Connect recovery equipment to vehicle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Recover refrigerant and transfer into designated recovery cylinder using recovery equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and workplace health safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate recovery equipment

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Record quantity and details of recovered refrigerant according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements3.2 Clear work area according to workplace procedures 3.3 Complete Australian Refrigeration Council accredited (ARCtick) service decal sticker and workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record quantity and details of recovered refrigerant according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements3.2 Clear work area according to workplace procedures 3.3 Complete Australian Refrigeration Council accredited (ARCtick) service decal sticker and workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record quantity and details of recovered refrigerant according to workplace procedures and regulatory requirements3.2 Clear work area according to workplace procedures 3.3 Complete Australian Refrigeration Council accredited (ARCtick) service decal sticker and workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
